<!-- Prague Travel Map Creator - Folium KML Converter -->

## Project Overview
Create a cute interactive Folium map from a KML file containing Prague travel destinations with categories (hotels, day walks, food, nightlife, romantic spots).

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify workspace created
- [x] Clarify requirements (KML to Folium converter)
- [x] Scaffold project structure
- [x] Customize for KML parsing
- [ ] Install dependencies
- [ ] Test map generation
- [ ] Create and run task
- [ ] Documentation complete

## Project Details
- **Language**: Python 3.x
- **Main libraries**: folium, xml.etree.ElementTree (stdlib)
- **Input**: KML file with Prague locations
- **Output**: Interactive HTML map file
